steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence states the lesson (genes interact with protein products). The second sentence describes researchers' response: they shifted focus to include the proteome, not just the genome. The transition must show this cause-and-effect connection.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
”Accordingly” means “as a result; in an appropriate way given the circumstances,” and here it shows that the research shift is a logical response to learning about gene-protein interactions. “In other words” would restate, “That said” would introduce contrast, and “For example” would provide an example, none fitting the cause-and-effect relationship.

D is correct.
